channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-12235] sanity-hsm test_250: 'request on 0x200001b71:0x260:0x0 is not STARTED on mds1'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for wangshilong <wshilong@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/003ea9be-686a-11e9-aeec-52540065bddc

test_250 failed with the following error:

request on 0x200001b71:0x260:0x0 is not STARTED on mds1

Waiting 10 secs for update
CMD: trevis-36vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions | awk '/'0x200001b71:0x260:0x0'.*action='REMOVE'/

{print \$13}' | cut -f2 -d=
CMD: trevis-36vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions | awk '/'0x200001b71:0x260:0x0'.*action='REMOVE'/ {print $13}

' | cut -f2 -d=
CMD: trevis-36vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions | awk '/'0x200001b71:0x260:0x0'.*action='REMOVE'/

{print \$13}' | cut -f2 -d=
CMD: trevis-36vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions | awk '/'0x200001b71:0x260:0x0'.*action='REMOVE'/ {print $13}

' | cut -f2 -d=
CMD: trevis-36vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions | awk '/'0x200001b71:0x260:0x0'.*action='REMOVE'/

{print \$13}' | cut -f2 -d=
CMD: trevis-36vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions | awk '/'0x200001b71:0x260:0x0'.*action='REMOVE'/ {print $13}

' | cut -f2 -d=
CMD: trevis-36vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions | awk '/'0x200001b71:0x260:0x0'.*action='REMOVE'/

{print \$13}' | cut -f2 -d=
CMD: trevis-36vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions | awk '/'0x200001b71:0x260:0x0'.*action='REMOVE'/ {print $13}

' | cut -f2 -d=
CMD: trevis-36vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions | awk '/'0x200001b71:0x260:0x0'.*action='REMOVE'/

{print \$13}' | cut -f2 -d=
CMD: trevis-36vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions | awk '/'0x200001b71:0x260:0x0'.*action='REMOVE'/ {print $13}

' | cut -f2 -d=
Update not seen after 200s: wanted 'STARTED' got 'WAITING'
sanity-hsm test_250: @@@@@@ FAIL: request on 0x200001b71:0x260:0x0 is not STARTED on mds1
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:5838:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-hsm.sh:742:wait_request_state()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-hsm.sh:4475:test_250()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6125:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6164:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6011:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity-hsm.sh:4494:main()

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-hsm test_250 - request on 0x200001b71:0x260:0x0 is not STARTED on mds1
item.summary: sanity-hsm test_250: 'request on 0x200001b71:0x260:0x0 is not STARTED on mds1'

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment: +1 on master at https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/a2806831-1ccb-4ef1-86a6-fc9adfc93ce9
+1 on recent master at https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/aed1a60e-5368-11ea-b810-52540065bddc
